description: Use this API to remove a participating reactive power dispatch variable from a specified OPF linear constraint dependency equation in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_lnceqn_qgen(iqid, eibus, genid)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: specified linear constraint equation does not exist.
specified machine does not exist at bus.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
